title: ottleya wrightii
intro: Ottleya wrightii, also known as Wright's selenicereus or Wright's night-blooming cereus, is a species of cactus native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The medicinal properties of Ottleya wrightii lie in its ability to be used as a natural laxative and to treat various gastrointestinal issues due to its high fiber content. The plant's health benefits include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve digestive health, and provide antioxidant properties. Ottleya wrightii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal usage.
